picks.title: From Strawberry Fields to Silicon Valley: How Chinese Residents Have Shaped Mountain View
picks.why: Learn how Chinese residents shaped Mountain View's identity at this free historical talk, Sat May 9.

picks.title: Campbell Library Grand Opening
picks.why: Campbell Library's grand reopening features lion dancers, characters, crafts, and live music—free family celebration, Sat May 9.

picks.title: Berryessa Art Festival
picks.why: The 49th Berryessa Art Festival brings thousands for art, food, and community—a South Bay tradition, Sat May 9.

picks.title: FOPAL Book Sale
picks.why: Over 70,000 reasonably priced books, CDs, DVDs in three rooms—FOPAL's monthly sale, Sun May 10.

picks.title: Bay FC AANHPI Heritage Match
picks.why: Bay FC women's soccer match celebrating AANHPI heritage with family activities at PayPal Park, Sun May 10.
